mapper.sql: su.id id, su.team_id team_id, su.title title, su.content content, su.start_time start_time, su.end_time end_time, su.creator_id creator_id, su.leader_user_id leader_user_id, su.visibility_type visibility_type, su.status status, su.create_time create_time, su.update_time update_time
mapper.insert: insert into app_team_schedule ( team_id, title, content, start_time, end_time, creator_id, leader_user_id, visibility_type, status, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{team_id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{start_time}, #{end_time}, #{creator_id}, #{leader_user_id}, IFNULL(#{visibility_type},'1'), #{status}, now(), now() )
insert into app_team_schedule_member ( schedule_id, user_id, create_time ) values ( #{schedule_id}, #{user_id}, now() )
mapper.select: SELECT sm.schedule_id schedule_id, sm.user_id user_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(IFNULL(u.nickname,'')),''),u.username,CONCAT('用户#',sm.user_id)) as user_name FROM app_team_schedule_member sm left join app_user u on CAST(u.id AS CHAR)=CAST(sm.user_id AS CHAR) where 1 = 1 and sm.schedule_id = #{schedule_id}

SELECT COUNT(1) as total_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(status,'') AS CHAR)='2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as done_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(status,'') AS CHAR) IN ('0','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(status,'') AS CHAR)='3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as overdue_cnt FROM app_schedule_task WHERE CAST(schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{schedule_id} AS CHAR)

SELECT su.assignee_id as assignee_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(IFNULL(au.nickname,'')),''),au.username,su2.USERNAME,CONCAT('用户#',CAST(su.assignee_id AS CHAR))) as assignee_name, COUNT(1) as total_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(su.status,'') AS CHAR)='2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as done_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(su.status,'') AS CHAR) IN ('0','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(su.status,'') AS CHAR)='3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as overdue_cnt, MAX(su.deadline) as deadline, MAX(su.update_time) as update_time FROM app_schedule_task su left join app_user au on CAST(au.id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.assignee_id AS CHAR) left join sys_user su2 on CAST(su2.id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.assignee_id AS CHAR) WHERE CAST(su.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{schedule_id} AS CHAR) GROUP BY su.assignee_id,COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(IFNULL(au.nickname,'')),''),au.username,su2.USERNAME,CONCAT('用户#',CAST(su.assignee_id AS CHAR))) ORDER BY overdue_cnt DESC,active_cnt DESC,done_cnt ASC,assignee_id ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE app_team_schedule
team_id = #{team_id}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, start_time = #{start_time}, end_time = #{end_time}, creator_id = #{creator_id}, leader_user_id = #{leader_user_id}, visibility_type = #{visibility_type}, status = #{status},
update_time = now(),
WHERE id = #{id};
mapper.select:
SELECT
,team_id.id as team_id_id1 ,team_id.team_name as team_id_team_name1 ,team_id.creator_id as team_id_creator_id1 ,team_id.admin_id as team_id_admin_id1 ,team_id.description as team_id_description1 ,team_id.status as team_id_status1 ,team_id.create_time as team_id_create_time1 ,team_id.update_time as team_id_update_time1 ,creator_id.id as creator_id_id1 ,COALESCE(creator_id.USERNAME, CASE WHEN su.creator_id IS NULL OR TRIM(IFNULL(CAST(su.creator_id AS CHAR),'')) = '' THEN '(未设置)' ELSE CONCAT('ID:', TRIM(CAST(su.creator_id AS CHAR)), '（无匹配账号）') END) as creator_id_USERNAME1 ,creator_id.PASSWORD as creator_id_PASSWORD1 ,creator_id.NAME as creator_id_NAME1 ,creator_id.role_manage_id as creator_id_role_manage_id1 ,creator_id.create_time as creator_id_create_time1 ,creator_id.update_time as creator_id_update_time1 ,creator_id.signature as creator_id_signature1 ,leader_u.id as leader_user_id_id1 ,COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(IFNULL(leader_u.nickname,'')),''),leader_u.username, CASE WHEN su.leader_user_id IS NULL OR TRIM(IFNULL(CAST(su.leader_user_id AS CHAR),'')) = '' THEN '(未设置)' ELSE CONCAT('ID:', TRIM(CAST(su.leader_user_id AS CHAR)), '（无匹配账号）') END) as leader_user_name1 ,CASE CAST(IFNULL(su.visibility_type,'1') AS CHAR) WHEN '2' THEN '指定成员' ELSE '全体成员' END as visibility_type_name1 ,(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(IFNULL(u.nickname,'')),''),u.username,CONCAT('用户#',sm.user_id)) ORDER BY sm.id SEPARATOR ', ' ) FROM app_team_schedule_member sm left join app_user u on CAST(u.id AS CHAR)=CAST(sm.user_id AS CHAR) WHERE CAST(sm.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR) ) as member_user_names1 ,(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CAST(sm.user_id AS CHAR) ORDER BY sm.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM app_team_schedule_member sm WHERE CAST(sm.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR) ) as member_user_ids1 ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_schedule_task ast WHERE CAST(ast.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR)) as progress_total1 ,(SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(ast.status,'') AS CHAR)='2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM app_schedule_task ast WHERE CAST(ast.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR)) as progress_done1 ,(SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(ast.status,'') AS CHAR) IN ('0','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM app_schedule_task ast WHERE CAST(ast.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR)) as progress_active1 ,(SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(ast.status,'') AS CHAR)='3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM app_schedule_task ast WHERE CAST(ast.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR)) as progress_overdue1 FROM app_team_schedule su
left join app_team team_id on team_id.id=su.team_id left join sys_user creator_id on CAST(creator_id.id AS CHAR)=TRIM(CAST(IFNULL(su.creator_id,'') AS CHAR)) left join app_user leader_u on CAST(leader_u.id AS CHAR)=TRIM(CAST(IFNULL(su.leader_user_id,'') AS CHAR)) where 1 = 1 and CAST(IFNULL(team_id.audit_status,'') AS CHAR) = '1' and CAST(IFNULL(team_id.status,'') AS CHAR) = '1' and su.id = #{id} and su.team_id = #{team_id} and su.title = #{title} and su.content = #{content} and su.start_time = #{start_time} and su.end_time = #{end_time} and su.creator_id = #{creator_id} and su.leader_user_id = #{leader_user_id} and su.visibility_type = #{visibility_type} and su.status = #{status} and su.create_time = #{create_time} and su.update_time = #{update_time}
and ( CAST(su.team_id AS CHAR) in ( SELECT CAST(t.id AS CHAR) FROM app_team t WHERE CAST(t.admin_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{login_user_id} AS CHAR) OR CAST(t.creator_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{login_user_id} AS CHAR) ) OR CAST(su.team_id AS CHAR) in ( SELECT CAST(tu.team_id AS CHAR) FROM app_team_user tu WHERE CAST(tu.user_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{login_user_id} AS CHAR) AND CAST(IFNULL(tu.status,'') AS CHAR)='1' ) )

SELECT
,team_id.id as team_id_id1 ,team_id.team_name as team_id_team_name1 ,team_id.creator_id as team_id_creator_id1 ,team_id.admin_id as team_id_admin_id1 ,team_id.description as team_id_description1 ,team_id.status as team_id_status1 ,team_id.create_time as team_id_create_time1 ,team_id.update_time as team_id_update_time1 ,creator_id.id as creator_id_id1 ,COALESCE(creator_id.USERNAME, CASE WHEN su.creator_id IS NULL OR TRIM(IFNULL(CAST(su.creator_id AS CHAR),'')) = '' THEN '(未设置)' ELSE CONCAT('ID:', TRIM(CAST(su.creator_id AS CHAR)), '（无匹配账号）') END) as creator_id_USERNAME1 ,creator_id.PASSWORD as creator_id_PASSWORD1 ,creator_id.NAME as creator_id_NAME1 ,creator_id.role_manage_id as creator_id_role_manage_id1 ,creator_id.create_time as creator_id_create_time1 ,creator_id.update_time as creator_id_update_time1 ,creator_id.signature as creator_id_signature1 ,leader_u.id as leader_user_id_id1 ,COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(IFNULL(leader_u.nickname,'')),''),leader_u.username, CASE WHEN su.leader_user_id IS NULL OR TRIM(IFNULL(CAST(su.leader_user_id AS CHAR),'')) = '' THEN '(未设置)' ELSE CONCAT('ID:', TRIM(CAST(su.leader_user_id AS CHAR)), '（无匹配账号）') END) as leader_user_name1 ,CASE CAST(IFNULL(su.visibility_type,'1') AS CHAR) WHEN '2' THEN '指定成员' ELSE '全体成员' END as visibility_type_name1 ,(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(IFNULL(u.nickname,'')),''),u.username,CONCAT('用户#',sm.user_id)) ORDER BY sm.id SEPARATOR ', ' ) FROM app_team_schedule_member sm left join app_user u on CAST(u.id AS CHAR)=CAST(sm.user_id AS CHAR) WHERE CAST(sm.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR) ) as member_user_names1 ,(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CAST(sm.user_id AS CHAR) ORDER BY sm.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM app_team_schedule_member sm WHERE CAST(sm.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR) ) as member_user_ids1 ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_schedule_task ast WHERE CAST(ast.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR)) as progress_total1 ,(SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(ast.status,'') AS CHAR)='2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM app_schedule_task ast WHERE CAST(ast.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR)) as progress_done1 ,(SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(ast.status,'') AS CHAR) IN ('0','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM app_schedule_task ast WHERE CAST(ast.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR)) as progress_active1 ,(SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(ast.status,'') AS CHAR)='3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM app_schedule_task ast WHERE CAST(ast.schedule_id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.id AS CHAR)) as progress_overdue1 FROM app_team_schedule su
left join app_team team_id on team_id.id=su.team_id left join sys_user creator_id on CAST(creator_id.id AS CHAR)=TRIM(CAST(IFNULL(su.creator_id,'') AS CHAR)) left join app_user leader_u on CAST(leader_u.id AS CHAR)=TRIM(CAST(IFNULL(su.leader_user_id,'') AS CHAR)) where 1 = 1 and CAST(IFNULL(team_id.audit_status,'') AS CHAR) = '1' and CAST(IFNULL(team_id.status,'') AS CHAR) = '1' and su.id = #{pd.id} and su.team_id = #{pd.team_id} and su.title = #{pd.title} and su.content = #{pd.content} and su.start_time = #{pd.start_time} and su.end_time = #{pd.end_time} and su.creator_id = #{pd.creator_id} and su.leader_user_id = #{pd.leader_user_id} and su.visibility_type = #{pd.visibility_type} and su.status = #{pd.status} and su.create_time = #{pd.create_time} and su.update_time = #{pd.update_time}
and ( CAST(su.team_id AS CHAR) in ( SELECT CAST(t.id AS CHAR) FROM app_team t WHERE CAST(t.admin_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{pd.login_user_id} AS CHAR) OR CAST(t.creator_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{pd.login_user_id} AS CHAR) ) OR CAST(su.team_id AS CHAR) in ( SELECT CAST(tu.team_id AS CHAR) FROM app_team_user tu WHERE CAST(tu.user_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{pd.login_user_id} AS CHAR) AND CAST(IFNULL(tu.status,'') AS CHAR)='1' ) )
